paper.title_en: Scalar Charges in a Self-Dual Background
paper.abstract_en: In this work, we present a \(3+1d\) scalar QED model in a constant self-dual magnetic field configuration. We provide exact closed form analytic calculations of the partition function, the \(β\)-function, and the propagators. To our knowledge, we present the first closed-form finite expression for the matter field propagators in a self-dual background, which is made accessible by working entirely in the Landau level basis. This theory serves as a toy model for charged particles in parallel electric and magnetic fields, with natural extensions to studies of \(3+1d\) chiral magnetic effects and pulsar physics.
